notes: Computed from reinickendorf_person_trips_1pct_180000_210000_all_modes.json (298 person trips departing 18:00-21:00, 1% MATSim twin).
carRideRequests = trips with primaryMode car or ride; these form the robotaxi demand for sweep-reinickendorf.json.
PT share of evening trips is ~7.0% vs 17.7% in the Charlottenburg-Moabit-Tiergarten corridor: the outer district leans on walking (141 trips) and cars, not transit.
3 trips have primaryMode 'truck' (delivery tours sampled with the population); they are excluded from robotaxi demand.
Demand file ships without pickup/dropoff edges; the sweep runner nearest-edge matches all 88 car/ride trips onto the SUMO net (0 unmatched, max radius 250 m).
